output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q167431 wdt:P1523 ?superbowl .
  ?superbowl wdt:P585 ?year .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
